getConfirmation.title: Get Confirmation
getConfirmation.description: Receive instant confirmation by email or SMS, along with automatic reminders before your visit.

visitAndReview.title: Visit & Review
visitAndReview.description: Arrive on time and be seen in order. After the visit, leave a review to help the community.

services.heroTitle: Find the right care package for your next appointment
services.heroDescription: Browse active clinic services, compare duration and pricing, then book directly with the care team.
services.heroCalloutDescription: Choose a service first so the booking flow can prepare the right appointment details.
services.emptyDescription: Try another service name or clear your search to view all available services.

specialties.heroTitle: Find the right specialty for your care needs
specialties.heroDescription: Browse active specialties, compare care focus areas, and connect with doctors who match your symptoms or treatment plan.
specialties.heroCalloutDescription: Choose a specialty first to narrow doctor results and speed up appointment booking.
specialties.emptyDescription: Try another specialty name or select a different type to view available specialties.
